title: Passel Argente's uncle
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=CIS |image=[[File:Passels_Uncle.png]] |name=Passel Argente's uncle |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]]{{CWACite|7|Spy Girls}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Blue]] |skin=Blue |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Senator Padmé, do you know who that was?''"
"''No.''"
"''Passel Argente's uncle! He's probably connected to the Separatists!|Sheltay Retrac and Padmé Amidala|}} [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] [[Magistrate/Legends|Magistrate]] [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente's]] '''uncle''' was a [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He bribed [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bezz Drexx]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on behalf of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] in exchange for Drexx's loyalty. However, he was caught in the act while giving Drexx [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] at a party hosted by the senator, and evidence of Drexx's corruption ended up in the hands of the Republic. ==Biography== {{Quote|A word with you, Drexx… ''in private''.|The Koorivar|}} The uncle of [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]] [[Magistrate/Legends|Magistrate]]{{DB|character|passelargente|Argente, Passel}} [[Passel Argente/Legends|Passel Argente]] was a [[Koorivar/Legends|Koorivar]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who worked for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] fought between the Confederacy and [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the individual bribed the Republic's [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Bezz Drexx]] with [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] in exchange for Drexx's loyalty to the Separatists. Senator [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]] suspected that Drexx had been receiving bribes, but he never obtained any proof. [[File:PasselUncleWithDrexx.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Argente's uncle at Drexx's party]] The Koorivar delivered one such payment at a party hosted by Drexx on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. In order to get the senator alone, he had to pull Drexx away from talking with Senator [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and one of Senator Organa's [[Aide/Legends|aides]], [[Sheltay Retrac/Legends|Sheltay Retrac]], both of whom were already wary of Drexx after discussing his suspicious wealth with Organa. The pair followed the Koorivar and senator, finding the Koorivar presenting Drexx with a case of [[Currency/Legends|money]]. The Separatist expressed his hope that it would be enough to keep Drexx loyal to the Confederacy, but the senator was more focused on a [[Narglatch AirTech/Legends|Narglatch]] [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] that the money would allow him to buy. However, he then noticed Amidala spying on their conversation and called for his [[Security guard/Legends|guards]] to deal with her. She was able to escape with the evidence, which included a [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] of the Koorivar bribing the senator that she brought to the Republic. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Drexx, I'm sure you'll find this payment adequate to ensure your ''continued loyalty'' to the Separatists.|The Koorivar|}} The Koorivar was willing to bribe high officials for the Separatist cause. He had light [[Color/Legends|blue]] skin and light blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. ==Equipment== Argente's uncle wore an orange [[Shimmerbird tongue robe/Legends|robe]] made of [[Shimmerbird/Legends|shimmerbird]] [[Tongue/Legends|tongues]].{{DB|character|denariakee|Kee, Denaria}} ==Behind the scenes== Passel Argente's uncle appeared in "[[Spy Girls]]," a short [[Star Wars comic books|comic story]] written by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]], illustrated by [[Stewart McKenny]], and published in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 7|seventh volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] graphic novel series on [[January 31]], [[2007]].{{DarkHorse|url=Books/14-333/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Adventures-Volume-7|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 7}} ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|7|Spy Girls}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Passel Argente's uncle}} {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Argente, Passel's uncle}} [[Category:Confederacy of Independent Systems individuals]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Koorivar]] [[Category:Males]]
